page_content:
Prerequisite: CHBE422.

Corequisite: CHBE302.

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Chemical program; and permission of ENGR-Chemical & Biomolecular Engineering department.

Credit Only Granted for. CHBE424 or ENCH424.

Formerly: ENCH424.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

CHBE426 Chemical and Biomolecular Separation Processes (3 Credits) Separation by stages operations. Rate dependent separation processes. Design application in distillation, gas absorption, liquid extraction, drying, adsorption and ion exhange.
